title: ContractCall
description: A single request/response pair captured by the developer-mode recording proxy (spec 021, US2).

id.description: Monotonic session-scoped id. Used as the row key.

contract.description: Operation name at call time, e.g. plan.create.

contractVersion.description: Operation version at call time. Pinned per call.

request.description: Sanitized request payload. Sensitive fields and filesystem paths are redacted.

response.description: Response payload on success. Absent when the call errored.

error.description: Error envelope on failure. Absent on success.

durationMs.description: Monotonic elapsed time in milliseconds from dispatch to response or error.

payloadTruncated.description: True when the recorder truncated the stored request or response above the 64 KB threshold.
